mapper.select:
select id, title, content from blog where is_published=true
and is_internal=false
and title like #{queryPattern} order by update_time desc, id desc limit 10
select id, title from blog order by create_time desc

select id, title from blog where is_published=true
and is_internal=false
order by create_time desc

select b.id, b.title, b.first_picture, b.description, b.is_top, b.create_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, c.category_name, c.color as category_color, u.username as author_username, coalesce(u.nickname,'已注销用户') as author_nickname, u.avatar as author_avatar from blog as b left join category as c on b.category_id=c.id left join user as u on b.user_id=u.id where b.is_published=true
and b.is_internal=false

select b.id, b.title, b.first_picture, b.description, b.is_top, b.create_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, c.category_name, c.color as category_color, u.username as author_username, coalesce(u.nickname,'已注销用户') as author_nickname, u.avatar as author_avatar from category as c left join blog as b on b.category_id=c.id left join user as u on b.user_id=u.id where c.category_name=#{categoryName} and b.is_published=true
and b.is_internal=false

select b.id, b.title, b.first_picture, b.description, b.is_top, b.create_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, c.category_name, c.color as category_color, u.username as author_username, coalesce(u.nickname,'已注销用户') as author_nickname, u.avatar as author_avatar from tag as t left join blog_tag as bt on t.id=bt.tag_id left join blog as b on bt.blog_id=b.id left join category as c on b.category_id=c.id left join user as u on b.user_id=u.id where t.tag_name=#{tagName} and b.is_published=true
and b.is_internal=false
select id, views from blog
mapper.insert: insert into blog (title, first_picture, first_picture_asset_id, content, description, is_published, is_internal, is_recommend, is_appreciation, is_comment_enabled, is_top, create_time, update_time, views, words, read_time, category_id, user_id) values (#{title}, #{firstPicture}, #{firstPictureAssetId}, #{content}, #{description}, #{published}, #{internal}, #{recommend}, #{appreciation}, #{commentEnabled}, #{top}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{views}, #{words}, #{readTime}, #{category.id}, #{user.id})
mapper.update: update blog set is_recommend=#{recommend} where id=#{blogId}
update blog set is_top=#{top} where id=#{blogId}
update blog set views=#{views} where id=#{blogId}
mapper.select: select b.id, b.title, b.first_picture, b.first_picture_asset_id, b.content, b.description, b.is_recommend, b.is_published, b.is_internal, b.is_appreciation, b.is_comment_enabled, b.is_top, b.create_time, b.update_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, b.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.email, u.role, c.id as category_id, c.category_name, c.color as category_color, bt.tag_id as tag_id, t.tag_name as tag_name, t.color from blog as b left join user as u on b.user_id=u.id left join category as c on b.category_id=c.id left join blog_tag as bt on b.id=bt.blog_id left join tag as t on bt.tag_id=t.id where b.id=#{id} and b.user_id=#{userId}
select title from blog where id=#{id}

select b.id, b.title, b.first_picture, b.content, b.is_internal, b.is_appreciation, b.is_comment_enabled, b.is_top, b.create_time, b.update_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, c.category_name, c.color as category_color, u.username as author_username, coalesce(u.nickname,'已注销用户') as author_nickname, u.avatar as author_avatar, t.tag_name as tag_name, t.color from blog as b left join user as u on b.user_id=u.id left join category as c on b.category_id=c.id left join blog_tag as bt on b.id=bt.blog_id left join tag as t on bt.tag_id=t.id where b.id=#{id} and b.is_published=true and b.is_internal=false

select b.id, b.title, b.first_picture, b.content, b.is_internal, b.is_appreciation, b.is_comment_enabled, b.is_top, b.create_time, b.update_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, c.category_name, c.color as category_color, u.username as author_username, coalesce(u.nickname,'已注销用户') as author_nickname, u.avatar as author_avatar, t.tag_name as tag_name, t.color from blog as b left join user as u on b.user_id=u.id left join category as c on b.category_id=c.id left join blog_tag as bt on b.id=bt.blog_id left join tag as t on bt.tag_id=t.id where b.id=#{id} and b.is_published=true and b.is_internal=true
select count(*) from blog
select count(*) from blog where is_published=true and is_internal=false
select count(*) from blog where category_id=#{categoryId}
select count(*) from blog_tag where tag_id=#{tagId}
select is_comment_enabled from blog where id=#{blogId}
select is_published from blog where id=#{blogId}
select is_internal from blog where id=#{blogId}
select category_id, count(category_id) as blog_count from blog group by category_id
